description.en: End an active auction. If there are bids, the highest bidder wins. If no bids, the NFT is returned to the seller.
description.de: Eine aktive Auktion beenden. Bei Geboten gewinnt der Höchstbietende. Ohne Gebote wird das NFT an den Verkäufer zurückgegeben.
description.es: End an active auction. If there are bids, the highest bidder wins. If no bids, the NFT is returned to the seller.
description.fr: End an active auction. If there are bids, the highest bidder wins. If no bids, the NFT is returned to the seller.
description.ro: End an active auction. If there are bids, the highest bidder wins. If no bids, the NFT is returned to the seller.
description.it: End an active auction. If there are bids, the highest bidder wins. If no bids, the NFT is returned to the seller.

description.en: The ID of the auction to end.
description.de: Die ID der zu beendenden Auktion.
